violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the back kitchen was blocked by prep table. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/09/2026

Shell eggs are served raw or undercooked to the customer's request. A written consumer advisory (on the menu, table tent, or placard) is not provided to the consumer informing them of the significantly increased risk associated with certain vulnerable consumers eating such food in a raw or undercooked form. Establishment is to provide a written consumer advisory. Per PIC, establishment is waiting on printing company to finish revised menus and deliver. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/09/2026

Establishment was observed bottling their house-made juices and offering them in their grab and go case. Establishment does not have prior approval through an approved HACCP plan and shall cease the practice. Per PIC, bottled juices in the grab and go case were made this morning. Food items were observed held at and were placed into cups to allow the transfer of oxygen into the food items. Specialized process guidance provided during the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 03/23/2026
The hand-washing sink in the back kitchen was blocked by prep table. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. New Violation. Correct By: 03/09/2026

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. Establishment is to sanitize all dishes and utensils in the sanitizing basin of the 3-bay sink in the kitchen until unit is repaired or replaced. Call for service was placed during the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 03/09/2026

Food items within the top portion of prep unit #2 were observed held at 43 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Food items were observed held above the fill line of unit and were placed into walk-in cooler to properly cool. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/09/2026

Shell eggs are served raw or undercooked to the customer's request. A written consumer advisory (on the menu, table tent, or placard) is not provided to the consumer informing them of the significantly increased risk associated with certain vulnerable consumers eating such food in a raw or undercooked form. Establishment is to provide a written consumer advisory. New Violation. Correct By: 03/09/2026

Granola packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Guidance document provided during the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 03/09/2026
